title: Absolute Order: Custom Chest Auto-Sorter
description: Achieve fast inventory clearing with custom auto-deposit. The game finally knows exactly what you really want and where you want it.
body:
# Absolute Order

> Achieve fast inventory clearing with custom auto-deposit. The game finally knows exactly what you really want and where you want it.

Tired of manually sorting your loot after a long mining session? Returning to your base should feel rewarding, not like a chore. **Absolute Order** revolutionizes inventory management by giving you complete control over your storage system. Design your chests visually, set strict sorting rules, and empty your inventory with a single click. 

Whether you are a casual player looking to tidy up your starter base or a technical modpack player managing thousands of items, this mod provides the ultimate vanilla-friendly solution to chest chaos.

![Absolute Order vs Vanilla Chaos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/511e0e52bf4e7827c79c9f5a4e99ab782328078b.png)

## One Click Auto-Deposit

The core of Absolute Order is pure efficiency. Once you have defined your chest rules, you no longer need to drag and drop items. Simply press the dedicated "Deposit" button (or your configured hotkey). ⚡ 

Watch your chaotic inventory instantly fly into the exact slots you designated. The system intelligently scans your inventory and only extracts the items that match your custom chest filters, leaving your essential tools and food untouched.

![Instant Inventory Sorting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tGfovP6L/images/29f9b13817623ba783949fe7719c5bccd4f0f5dc.gif)

## Visual Chest Customization

Organization should be beautiful as well as functional. We have integrated a comprehensive suite of painting tools directly into the chest interface, allowing you to color-code your storage without crafting dozens of different colored chests. 🎨 

* **Area & Trace Modes:** Click and drag to quickly fill large sections with colored backgrounds, or draw complex, irregular layouts with pinpoint precision.
* **Color Palette:** Choose from a wide palette of vibrant neon colors to visually separate your storage zones (e.g., blue for ores, green for crops).
* **Eyedropper Tool:** Instantly copy a color from an existing slot to maintain a cohesive look across your entire storage room.

![Fast Area Painting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tGfovP6L/images/f5c3161d5e06a3d0438d8efa76b84ded07243dba.gif)

## Advanced Filtering System

Your storage, your rules. You can select specific areas within your chest and apply absolute filters to them. If a slot is designated for diamonds, nothing else will ever enter it. 🛡️ 

Creating complex filters is effortless thanks to our advanced custom GUI:
* **Import Extracted:** Click once to automatically add all physical items currently in the selected slots to your filter list.
* **Tag & Search Import:** Use the search bar to import multiple matching items instantly, or click on a specific item tag (like all logs or all stones) to add the entire category at once.
* **Strict Enforcement:** The system actively denies incorrect items, playing a rejection animation if you try to insert the wrong block manually.

![Advanced Tag Import](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tGfovP6L/images/e3555fc52be238da2394d885598fe4ef13cdd28f.gif)

## Fully Configurable to Your Liking

Absolute Order is designed to adapt to your playstyle, not the other way around. We have included an extensive configuration menu that lets you tweak almost every aspect of the mod:

* **Client & Visuals:** Don't like a cluttered UI? You can easily toggle off the editor buttons, hide the left preview panel, or disable animations. You can even adjust the exact transparency levels of the colored backgrounds and separation lines to match your aesthetic. Dark mode is also fully supported! 🌙
* **Server & Mechanics:** Server admins and technical players can adjust mechanical behaviors, such as whether the chest actively expels invalid items.
* **Custom Hotkeys:** Bind every action—from toggling the edit panels to performing an instant deposit—to your preferred keyboard keys. ⌨️

## Universal Compatibility

You are not restricted to standard wooden boxes. Absolute Order is built from the ground up to be a universal storage solution. 📦 

It seamlessly integrates with vanilla chests, barrels, ender chests, and shulker boxes. It even works perfectly with mobile storage like minecarts and boats with chests, as well as many popular modded storage containers!

![Universal Container Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10972c94c828d72359f929617e7e466dc367d63f.png)

---
**Modpack Creators:** You are entirely free to include Absolute Order in your modpacks. Help your players keep their bases perfectly organized!

---

<details>
<summary>Looking for the Legacy Version (1.1/2)? Click here</summary>

# Chest Separators



**Stop wasting inventory slots with sticks or dirt blocks.**

Chest Separators is a utility that lets you organize your storage visually by drawing dividers directly onto the container interface. Keep 100% of your slots available for actual loot. 📦



![Transform a messy dump chest into a perfectly organized storage system without wasting a single inventory slot on filler items.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/marcsanz-dev/Chest-Separators-Mod/refs/heads/main/img/chaos_vs_order_showcase.gif)



---



## Main Features



### Drag and Paint

Forget about clicking slot by slot. Just click and drag your mouse across the inventory to draw lines instantly. It feels like using Paint inside Minecraft! 🖌️



![Forget clicking slot by slot. Our custom raycast algorithm lets you click and drag to draw lines naturally and instantly across the grid.](https://github.com/marcsanz-dev/Chest-Separators-Mod/raw/main/img/raycast_drag_paint.gif)



### Shulker Box Support

Bring your customized layouts wherever you go! Chest Separators fully supports Shulker Boxes. Your visual designs are saved directly to the box's data, meaning you can break it, carry it in your inventory, or store it in your Ender Chest without losing a single line. The ultimate portable storage ecosystem! 🎒✨



![The Perfect Storage Ecosystem (v1.2)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tGfovP6L/images/94b71376fb4424e7097f41cc824feccafc928a88.gif)



### RGB Color Picker

Why settle for 16 colors? The custom engine lets you pick **any color you want**. 🎨

* **Full RGB/HSV Selector:** Create the perfect gradient for your storage room.

* **Saved Palettes:** Save your 8 favorite custom colors for quick access.



![Break free from the basic 16 colors. Use the new HSV picker to choose any shade (16M+ options) and save your favorites to the palette.](https://github.com/marcsanz-dev/Chest-Separators-Mod/raw/main/img/hsv_color_picker_integration.gif)



### Copy and Paste System

Designing a massive storage room? You don't have to draw the same layout 50 times. 📋

1. Design one chest.

2. Click **Copy**.

3. **Paste** the layout instantly into any other container (Chests, Barrels, Shulkers...).



![Design one chest perfectly, then copy the layout and paste it into all your other chests, barrels, or shulkers in seconds.](https://github.com/marcsanz-dev/Chest-Separators-Mod/raw/main/img/nbt_serialization_clipboard.gif)



### Smart Tools

Need to fix a mistake? You have full control: 🛠️

* **Eraser:** Remove specific lines with precision.

* **Trash Can:** Instantly clear the entire layout to start fresh.



![Full control over your design. Use the Eraser to fix specific lines or the Trash Can to wipe the entire container clean instantly.](https://github.com/marcsanz-dev/Chest-Separators-Mod/raw/main/img/state_management_tools.gif)



---



## How to Use

1. Open any Chest, Barrel, or Shulker Box.

2. Click the **Pencil Icon** in the top right corner.

3. Select a color and start drawing!

4. *(Optional)* Click the **Palette Icon** to open the advanced Color Picker.



**Note on Multiplayer:** For standard Chests, Barrels, and Ender Chests, this mod is **100% Client-Side** and can be used on any vanilla server. However, to use the advanced Shulker Box persistence feature (keeping your layout when breaking the box), the mod must also be installed on the server.

</details>
